Ident	"SELECT"
Number	"1"
Ident	"as"
Ident	"test_value"
Comma	","
String	"'$container.$selectednamespace.8090.svc'"
Ident	"as"
Ident	"host_pattern"
Comma	","
Ident	"CASE"
Ident	"WHEN"
Ident	"position"
LParen	"("
String	"'$container.$selectednamespace.8090.svc'"
Comma	","
String	"'.'"
RParen	")"
Op	">"
Number	"0"
Ident	"THEN"
String	"'SUCCESS: Concatenation worked - contains dots'"
Ident	"ELSE"
String	"'FAILED: Variables not properly concatenated'"
Ident	"END"
Ident	"as"
Ident	"status"
Comma	","
Comment	"-- Simulate a real query that would use this pattern"
Ident	"concat"
LParen	"("
String	"'http://'"
Comma	","
String	"'$container.$selectednamespace.8090.svc'"
Comma	","
String	"'/metrics'"
RParen	")"
Ident	"as"
